summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing of Sr-Renovation quote/invoice management app. All 29 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests successful - dashboard, quote form with live preview, invoice form with acompte calculation, client manager, and list pages all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> and <tr> cannot be child of <span> - HTML nesting issue in PDFPreview.js table rendering. Not blocking functionality but should be fixed for proper HTML structure.
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix HTML nesting in PDFPreview.js - tbody/span warning (not blocking)
OPTIONAL: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed clients, quotes, and invoices during testing to verify CRUD operations and per-client numbering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Application fully tested. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_sr_renovation_api.py cover: clients CRUD with optional email, quotes with per-client DEVIS-XX numbering and % discount calculation, invoices with per-client FACT-XX numbering and acompte/reste_a_payer calculation, catalog CRUD, and stats endpoint. Frontend tested: Dashboard with stats/recent items, QuoteForm with live preview and inline client creation, InvoiceForm with acompte_paid input, ClientsManager with optional email, QuotesList with search, InvoicesList with search and payment status badges.

features_verified.dashboard: Stats (clients, quotes, invoices, revenue), recent quotes/invoices, quick action buttons
features_verified.quote_form: Inline new client creation (optional email), services with catalog integration, % discount calculation, live PDF preview updates in real-time, diagnostic checkboxes
features_verified.invoice_form: Inline new client creation (optional email), services with catalog, % discount, acompte_paid input, reste_a_payer calculation, live PDF preview
features_verified.client_manager: Create/edit/delete clients with optional email field, search functionality
features_verified.quotes_list: Per-client sequential numbering (DEVIS-01, DEVIS-02 per client), search, view/edit/delete
features_verified.invoices_list: Per-client sequential numbering (FACT-01, FACT-02), payment status badges (pending/partial/paid), reste_a_payer display, search
features_verified.catalog_dialog: Opens from both quote and invoice forms, shows services with prices, click to add to form
